data.location: 100 City Centre Dr (The Food District, Square One Shopping Centre), Mississauga, ON L5B 2C9, Canada
data.status: expected to open sometime in Summer 2026
data.short_description: A Vietnamese restaurant known for traditional noodle soups and grilled dishes is opening its second location inside The Food District at Square One Shopping Centre in Mississauga. No exact opening date has been announced. The expansion follows the success of its original North York location near Finch Station.

data.status: location has not been finalized
data.short_description: A recently filed permit calls for renovations at 4101 Charlotte Ave #d120 in Sylvan Park, which would mark Elegy Coffee's fifth location. A company representative confirmed the team is eyeing the space but stated the location has not been finalized.

data.status: open by the end of May
data.short_description: A Canadian grilled cheese and burger chain is opening a location adjacent to the University of Central Florida after permit applications were filed with the Florida DBPR. Franchisee Sathya Sreenivasan confirmed the restaurant will be open by the end of May.

data.status: opening soon
data.short_description: An Irish cocktail sports pub is set to replace the long-running lounge Karma at 51 1st Ave in the East Village, with a green facade and gold-leaf signage already installed. No exact opening date has been announced, but social media posts and completed exterior branding suggest doors will open soon.

data.status: on deck to open late this summer
data.short_description: A growing DFW coffee chain is opening a new location in Richardson at 200 E. Main Street, taking over the former Isabelly's Chocolates and Sweet Treats space. Owner David Bryant announced the location via social media, describing it as a homecoming to his hometown.

data.status: opening date will be sometime in May
data.short_description: Boka Restaurant Group is debuting The Ives, a contemporary American dining concept, inside the Chicago Athletic Association hotel, replacing the former Cherry Circle Room. Chef Chris Pandel is attached to the project, with breakfast items, entrees, parlor snacks, and seasonal cocktails expected on the menu.

data.event_date: Final week of August (year not specified)
data.status: anticipates…being customer-ready in the final week of August
data.short_description: Chef John Currence's Big Bad Breakfast is planning a second Memphis-area location in the Cooper-Young neighborhood, taking over the 2149 Young Avenue storefront that previously housed Mulan Asian Bistro. Renovations of the 5,000-square-foot space are already underway following Mulan's closure after a fire in September 2025.

data.status: opening date is looking like October or November
data.short_description: Schmidt Family Restaurant Group has announced the construction of a new stand-alone, 7,500-square-foot Buffalo Wild Wings at 2710 S 3rd Street, replacing the brand's current Ironton Hills Shopping Center location. Construction has just started and it will be the franchise group's largest Bdubs location.

data.status: scheduled to open later this year
data.short_description: Riviera Dining Group has announced HONŌ, a modern Japanese steakhouse, lounge, and rooftop concept, will open at E11EVEN Club Hotel & Residences Miami at 20 NE 11th Street. The restaurant will span three distinct environments across two floors, including a rooftop lounge with panoramic views.

data.location: 210 S. 12th St, Philadelphia, PA (zip code not specified)
data.status: plans to open
data.short_description: Michelin-starred Scratch Restaurants Group, founded by chefs Phillip Frankland Lee and Margarita Kallas-Lee, plans to open Sushi by Scratch Restaurants on the ground floor of 210 S. 12th St. in Philadelphia's Midtown Village. The elevated omakase concept will be accessible through a speakeasy-style door inside the co-located NADC Burger.

data.store_name: Not a Damn Change Burger (NADC Burger)
data.location: 210 S. 12th St, Philadelphia, PA (zip code not specified)
data.status: plans to open
data.short_description: NADC Burger, a viral Wagyu smash burger concept co-founded with professional skateboarder Neen Williams, will open alongside Sushi by Scratch Restaurants at 210 S. 12th St. in Philadelphia. Customers will enter through NADC Burger to access the sushi concept through a speakeasy-style interior door.

data.event_date: End of the year (year not specified)
data.status: hoping to open the new location by the end of the year
data.short_description: Family-owned Hometown Coffee & Juice is opening its sixth café at 25 E Hinsdale Avenue, located at the village's Metra station in downtown Hinsdale. Co-owner Lou Rubin stated the goal is to open by end of year, marking the brand's first venture into the western suburbs.

data.location: 8040 Greenback Ln C, Citrus Heights, CA 95610
data.status: anticipates opening the new space in June 2026
data.short_description: Valencia's Carniceria & Taqueria in Citrus Heights is expanding into the neighboring unit formerly occupied by Subway at the Sunrise MarketPlace. The expansion will add indoor restaurant seating and a more spacious experience, with the Valencia family now targeting June 2026 after a slight delay from an originally planned spring debut.

data.status: opening its first brick-and-mortar restaurant
data.short_description: Dos Manos Kitchen, a family-run Salvadoran catering and pop-up company known for handmade pupusas, is opening its first brick-and-mortar restaurant at The Charles River Speedway in Brighton. Chef Edwin Orellana and his wife Alexis launched the business during the pandemic, growing it from virtual classes to a recognized presence at Boston festivals and pop-ups.

data.status: opening timeline for the Indian Land location remains unclear at this time
data.short_description: Cooper's Hawk Winery & Restaurant has targeted the CrossRidge Center at 2181 Parkway Drive in Indian Land for its first Charlotte-area and first South Carolina location. No opening timeline has been announced.

data.status: An official opening date has not yet been announced
data.short_description: Le Croissant Bar, owned by Monica Kuchman, is set to open at 116 Lake St. in the former Starbucks space in Kirkland. The café will serve croissants, champagne, beer, and coffee, with liquor license recently approved by the Washington State Liquor and Cannabis Board.

data.location: 1784 La Costa Meadows Dr #105, San Marcos, CA 92078
data.status: plans to open a new production brewery in San Diego in May
data.short_description: Monday Morning, a non-alcoholic bottle shop brand, is opening a production brewery at the former Creative Creature Brewing space at 1784 La Costa Meadows Dr. #105 in San Marcos. An exact timeline for the associated taproom has not yet been announced.

data.location: 2545 Chino Hills Pkwy Suite A, Chino Hills, CA 91709
data.status: opening timeline remains unclear
data.short_description: Rise and Shine, a breakfast-lunch restaurant focused on clean, natural ingredients and made-from-scratch comfort food, will open at 2545 Chino Hills Parkway, Suite A, per a recent ABC filing. Renovations are underway per recent social media updates, but no opening timeline has been confirmed.

data.location: 2139 C Polk St, San Francisco, CA 94109
data.status: soon be operating
data.short_description: Bageletto is opening a new sit-down café at 2139 C Polk Street, taking over the former Peet's Coffee location following that store's three-month closure. The Polk Street location will offer fresh-baked, hand-rolled, boiled bagels with in-house schmears and Italian sandwiches.

data.location: Near Meijer on Burbank Road, Wooster, OH (exact address not specified)
data.status: getting ready to debut their second cafe
data.short_description: The Simms family, operators of the first Wooster Biggby Coffee at 2280 Akron Road, announced a second Wooster location to open this year near the Meijer grocery store on the north side of the city. An exact address has not been released.

data.status: plans to open in Monrovia this May
data.short_description: Schlap Muan, a popular Cambodian-inspired wings spot from Long Beach, plans to open its second location in Monrovia in May, taking over the former Burgerim space at 1108 S. Fifth Ave. The restaurant features wok-tossed wings with Cambodian and Chinese flavors.

data.status: currently revamping the space to prepare for opening
data.short_description: Chef Daniel Patterson and Sarah Lewitinn are opening Jacaranda, a fine-dining restaurant with a dinner party atmosphere, at 6623 Melrose Ave. in May, per a recent ABC permit filing. The duo previously ran the Jaca Social Club pop-up as a precursor to the concept.

data.location: 403 Dexter Ave. N Suite B, Seattle, WA 98109
data.status: will open "in the next couple of weeks," following a soft opening
data.short_description: Italian sandwich shop Panino will debut on the ground floor of the Tellus Apartment Complex at 403 Dexter Ave. N, Suite B in Seattle's South Lake Union neighborhood. The shop will serve imported Italian sandwiches alongside wine, spritzes, and Italian beers, and will sit next to sister shop Cannolo.

data.location: 9637 S Santa Monica Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90210
data.status: opening timeline remains unknown
data.short_description: Local Van Nuys bakery Sweet E's Bake Shop is opening a storefront at 9637 S. Santa Monica Blvd in Beverly Hills, as announced via Instagram and confirmed by owner Erica Tucker. The brand, launched in 2009, offers cakes, cupcakes, and customized cookies, and also has a thriving e-commerce platform.

data.status: slated to debut in early 2027
data.short_description: East West Club, a multipurpose club featuring golf simulators, a rooftop lounge, a café, office space, and wellness amenities, will open at 6 and 10 Dravus St. in Seattle's Queen Anne neighborhood. Owned by Shankar Sundaram and Ryan Schaffer, it will offer a tiered membership model and is slated to debut in early 2027.

data.status: plans to open at 118 N. Water Avenue in early summer
data.short_description: Mt. Juliet breakfast-and-brunch restaurant The Paper Mill is opening its second location at 118 N. Water Avenue in downtown Gallatin, with the 90-seat space currently undergoing renovations. The new location will include a milkshake bar as a new addition exclusive to this site.

data.status: building something new
data.short_description: The owners of Italian-American speakeasy Bar Enzo in Long Island City have filed for a liquor license to open a new location at 1073 1st Ave. in Midtown East. The new concept will operate as an all-day space with coffee in the morning and a speakeasy in the evening, carrying over Italian-American influences from the original.

data.location: 2121 Ave of the Stars, Los Angeles, CA 90067
data.status: recently opened
data.short_description: Chaumont, a French-inspired bakery and café, recently opened its fifth and largest location at 2121 Avenue of the Stars in Century City, spanning 5,000 square feet. The location features a full-service kitchen with an expanded menu including made-to-order breakfast and culinary-inspired lunch items.

data.status: closing soon
data.short_description: Chez TJ, a fine-dining restaurant operating inside a historic Victorian home since 1982, announced it will permanently close this April after more than 44 years. No official reason or exact closing date has been provided, per the restaurant's social media announcement.

data.status: slated to open…this Spring
data.short_description: Wingstop is opening a new location at 9213 West Road, Suite 100 in Northwest Houston this spring, with construction already underway. The opening is led by ongoing franchisee group GSR Group, with partner Rahul Agrawal having already opened multiple Texas locations this year.

data.location: 4190 S Rainbow Blvd Ste. 1, Las Vegas, NV 89103
data.status: coming soon
data.short_description: A Clark County permit confirms The Kickin' Crab, a Viet-Cajun seafood boil chain, is slated to open in Spring Valley at 4190 S Rainbow Blvd, Ste. 1. The brand, founded by Jan Nguyen in Southern California in 2017, currently operates more than 20 locations across California, Texas, Arizona, and Missouri.

data.event_date: Before end of year or early next year
data.status: should open before the end of the year or early next year
data.short_description: A recently filed permit indicates Popeyes is set to open in Nederland at 1804 Hwy 365, with construction expected to start in July and wrap by December 31. The $250,000 project will build a 2,215-square-foot quick-service restaurant operated by the CSM Group.

data.location: 3747 Las Vegas Blvd S Ste. 306, Las Vegas, NV 89109
data.status: coming soon
data.short_description: A Clark County Business License confirms Silverlake Ramen is opening its second Las Vegas location in the BLVD Complex at 3747 Las Vegas Blvd S, Ste. 306, on the Las Vegas Strip. The brand, founded in 2012 in Los Angeles, now operates more than 30 locations across seven states.

data.location: 600 N Presa St, San Antonio, TX 78205
data.status: slated to open at 600 N Presa St
data.short_description: Popular San Antonio food truck Lucky Patty Smash Burgers is opening its first brick-and-mortar location in the Maverick Building at 600 N Presa St, with a $1.2 million renovation of a 2,000-square-foot space. Construction is expected to start at the end of this month and wrap by September, per a recently filed permit.

data.location: 2010 W Ave J8 Suite 101, Lancaster, CA 93536
data.event_date: Earlier this year (exact date not specified)
data.status: closed earlier this year
data.short_description: Mexican restaurant Don Cuco closed earlier this year in Lancaster and is planning a return under a new name and concept. The team will reopen as Cuco's Cantina at a new location at 2010 West Ave. J8, Suite 101.

data.location: 2010 W Ave J8 Suite 101, Lancaster, CA 93536
data.status: opening timeline has not been announced yet
data.short_description: Don Cuco is relaunching as Cuco's Cantina at 2010 West Ave. J8, Suite 101 in Lancaster, with an ABC permit currently being secured. Menu details are still in the works and no opening timeline has been announced.

data.status: on deck for an early summer opening
data.short_description: Father-and-son team Teddy Jasper and his father are opening cocktail bar Spoken For at 477 S. Main Street in Memphis, taking over the space previously occupied by Longshot. The 4,500-square-foot bar is awaiting its alcohol license and is described as blending dive bar accessibility with neighborhood familiarity and cocktail bar quality.

data.status: no longer moving forward
data.short_description: Rush Bowls' planned third Massachusetts location at 315 Walnut St in Newtonville is no longer moving forward, confirmed by local franchisee Anjanette Cuan. Previously filed city permits and a "coming soon" sign had indicated the brand was preparing to open at the former Cobella Hair Salon space.

data.status: preparing to open
data.short_description: KERO+ Homemade Bites Brazilian Café is preparing to open at 374A Medford Street in Somerville's Winter Hill neighborhood, co-owned by Daniane Felicio and Júnior Garcia. The menu will feature homemade Brazilian favorites including coxinhas, pães de queijo, sandwiches, and Brazilian coffee.

data.status: getting ready to open its new Downtown spot
data.short_description: Brain Food Memphis, already operating in Cordova, is preparing to open a second location at 121 Union Avenue in downtown Memphis. Owner Tredarious Hayes describes the downtown location as the full expression of the brand, offering a dedicated branded environment and a more intentional dine-in experience.

data.status: opening date has not been announced
data.short_description: A liquor license application has been submitted for Mendocino Farms to open at 847 W Fulton Market in Chicago's Fulton Market District, which would be the chain's third Chicago-area location. An opening date has not been announced, as the project is described as early in the development stages.

data.location: 5324 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL 32839
data.status: will open at 5324 S. John Young Parkway in June 2026
data.short_description: Jack in the Box is opening at 5324 S. John Young Parkway in Orlando in June 2026, per its official website, as part of a 10-restaurant deal led by Florida franchisee Ed Zausch. The chain is making a return to Florida after previously closing all its Sunshine State locations.

data.location: 124 N Avondale Rd, Avondale Estates, GA 30002
data.status: hopes to open Last Dance…in May
data.short_description: Chef Kathryn Fitzgerald and three chef partners are opening Last Dance, a farm-to-table fine-dining restaurant with a cottage-inspired atmosphere, at 124 N. Avondale Rd. in May. The menu will include signature offerings such as liver eclair, lamb schnitzel, and whole fish, with a beverage program focused on classic cocktails and natural wines.

data.status: hoping to welcome guests…in mid- to late June 2026, pending final construction timelines
data.short_description: Low & Slow Southern Kitchen + Tap, a Southern-inspired smokehouse and barbecue concept, is preparing to open at 11 Elm St in downtown Amesbury. The concept will also feature the 1874 Bourbon Room upstairs, a speakeasy-style bar and event space spotlighting high-end bourbons, whiskeys, and craft cocktails.

data.status: debut a new brick-and-mortar…this year
data.short_description: Billy Bricks Pizza will open a new location at 5 S Madison Street in downtown Oswego, marking the chain's continued expansion across Chicagoland. CEO Ric Gruber has not announced an opening date, as the company is still determining when to break ground.

data.location: 4418 Monroe Rd Suite A, Charlotte, NC 28205
data.status: hopes to open the storefront in May
data.short_description: Farmers market pop-up Thoughtful Baking Co. is opening its first brick-and-mortar location at 4418 Monroe Rd, Suite A in Charlotte's Oakhurst neighborhood, with cosmetic renovations currently underway. The 3,500-square-foot space will include a kitchen, storefront with pick-up window, and a back room for classes.

data.status: will open Philadelphia's first "Barlour" in Rittenhouse Square this spring
data.short_description: Boozy ice cream brand Tipsy Scoop will open Philadelphia's first "Barlour" at 119 S 18th St. in Rittenhouse Square this spring, in partnership with local spirits retailer BOTLD. The company-owned location will offer core cocktail-inspired ice cream flavors alongside exclusive Philadelphia-specific items.

data.status: will open in 2026, though an exact date has not been announced
data.short_description: Chef Giorgio Rapicavoli is opening Luca Steak, a 4,500-square-foot Italian steakhouse concept, at Wynwood Plaza at 95 NW 29th Street in Miami. The restaurant will also feature 2,000 square feet of outdoor space adjacent to the building's 26,000-square-foot public plaza.

data.status: scheduled to open summer of 2026
data.short_description: Sanguich, a Michelin Bib Gourmand-designated Cuban sandwich shop, has signed a ten-year lease to open a 1,350-square-foot location at Wynwood Plaza at 55-95 NW 29th Street. The new Wynwood location will join existing shops in Little Haiti, Aventura Mall, Coral Gables, and Bayside Marketplace.

data.status: shuttering after 17 years
data.short_description: Burger King's Whopper Bar at Universal's CityWalk will close after service on April 21, after 17 years of operation. Five Guys has been targeted to move into the space, with an expected opening date of summer 2026.

data.status: expected opening date of summer 2026
data.short_description: Five Guys is set to take over the former Burger King Whopper Bar space at Universal's CityWalk at 6000 Universal Boulevard. The new location will be operated by Utah-based North Star Dining USA Inc., which owns more than 15 Five Guys locations in the Orlando market.

data.status: set to reopen this spring under new ownership
data.short_description: The Slip, a longtime Kirkland waterfront burger restaurant that closed in September 2025, is set to reopen this spring under new owners Ricky and Maria Eng. The Washington State Liquor and Cannabis Board has recently approved The Slip's new liquor license.

data.status: slated to open the fourth quarter of 2027
data.short_description: SunLife Organics will open at JEM Private Residences at Miami Worldcenter, 1016 NE Second Avenue, in the fourth quarter of 2027. The wellness-focused smoothie and café brand will serve residents and visitors with a health-forward, all-day menu.

data.location: Minock Park Place development, intersection of Grand River Ave and Minock St, Detroit, MI (exact address not specified)
data.event_date: End of July or August (year not specified)
data.status: debut the restaurant close to the opening of the development, around the end of July or August
data.short_description: Calixto Mexican Grill is opening a second location within the upcoming Minock Park Place development in Detroit's Grandmont-Rosedale area, approximately two years after opening its first location in Livonia. Owner Enrique Aquino plans a larger kitchen and a satellite kitchen program for aspiring chefs at the new space.

data.status: set to open its second location in Washington…this spring
data.short_description: Eggslut will debut its second Washington location at Westfield Southcenter in Tukwila this spring, following the recent opening of its Seattle Capitol Hill location last fall. The Southcenter location will expand the menu to include Wagyu burgers and rosemary fries not available at other locations.

data.status: No opening date has been announced
data.short_description: Permit applications have been filed with the Florida DBPR for a Yonutz doughnut shop at 3140 West 84th Street, Unit 8 in Hialeah. The shop will be operated by Rashid Elghoul and will offer freshly baked doughnuts, breakfast sandwiches, shakes, and the brand's signature Smashed Donut.

data.status: opening on April 17, 2026
data.short_description: Cleo, a neighborhood rotisserie restaurant from Three Top Hospitality, is opening at 621 Hudson Street in New York's West Village on April 17, 2026. The kitchen is led by Chef Juliana Latif and the menu centers on marinated 24-hour rotisserie chicken served with three sauces, alongside Mediterranean and Middle Eastern-influenced dishes.

data.status: aiming for a spring opening
data.short_description: Blank Street Coffee is opening a flagship location at 32 Sixth Ave. in Tribeca, occupying 2,900 square feet in a space formerly held by Starbucks. The location will operate as a Blank Street Coffee & Matcha Shop, featuring the brand's signature coffees alongside an expanded matcha beverage menu.

data.status: recent openings
data.short_description: Pizzicata, an Italian restaurant founded by Federico Venturini and Chef Viola Tagliaferri, has recently opened at Citadelle Center at the northwest corner of Utopia Road and 59th Avenue in Glendale. The restaurant serves Neapolitan-style pizza, Roman pinsa, fresh pastas, and elevated Italian favorites.

data.status: recent openings
data.short_description: Fit Mind Wellness has recently opened at Citadelle Center in Glendale, offering mental health evaluation and counseling services for adults, children, teens, couples, and families. Specialties include EMDR therapy, first responder evaluations, and support for postpartum and pregnancy loss, among other services.

data.status: recent openings
data.short_description: Estetika Beauty Clinic has recently opened at Citadelle Center in Glendale as part of the center's continued tenant growth. No further details about the clinic's specific services are provided in the article.

data.location: 444 Park Ave S, New York, NY 10016
data.status: now open
data.short_description: Golden Child, a rooftop bar from Renwick Hospitality Group, is now open above Hotel Park Ave NYC at 444 Park Avenue South in NoMad. The concept pairs Ivy League-inspired décor with a Modern American menu from Executive Chef Carsten Johannsen and a cocktail-forward beverage program.

data.event_date: Winter of this year (year not specified)
data.status: anticipates opening a couple of months after construction kicks off, in the winter of this year
data.short_description: Baskin-Robbins is opening a new 1,398-square-foot location in the Valley Ranch Town Center at 21580 Marketplace Drive in New Caney, per a recently filed permit. The location is operated by Gaurang Patel of the Tattva Group, with construction expected to start in September.

data.status: Phase 1 is slated to wrap up by August 2026
data.short_description: Handies Douzo, a Houston-based chef-driven handroll and sushi concept, has signed a lease to open a 2,000-square-foot location within the new PAGEWOOD development at 1107 Hutchins Street in East Downtown Houston. The restaurant will be the development's first new retail tenant, with Phase 1 construction slated to wrap by August 2026.

data.status: hoping to soft open the cafe on April 30
data.short_description: Tous Les Jours is debuting a new West Michigan location at 5721 S Westnedge Avenue in Portage, with franchisee Heymanshudeep Singh hoping to soft open on April 30. Construction is complete and the team is currently in the hiring process.
